summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trail Test
description: This test case validates that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: To verify that system complies with FDA Part 11 and ISO 9001 requirements regarding encryption and audit trail storage.
prerequisites: System is configured to store patient records
Database is set up to track changes

test_steps.description: Enter a new patient record into the system
Verify that patient data is encrypted with AES-256
Perform an action that triggers a database change (e.g. update patient record)
Verify that audit trail is stored for the database change

expected_result: System behaves as per requirement, data is encrypted with AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
test_data: Sample patient record data (e.g. name, date of birth, medical history)
acceptance_criteria: Audit trail is stored for every database change
